retrieved_result: The Flash "This article is an overview of the characters called \"The Flash\". If you are looking for a particular Flash, see The Flash (Disambiguation). The Flashes The Flash is a Character produced by DC Comics. Often called \"The Fastest Man Alive\", the mantle of the Flash has been worn by six individuals
